modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to print documents from Microsoft Excel application.

full_description_text:  
I am having a problem with printing from Excel. When I try to print, I get an error message saying my file could not be printed. This issue does not happen with other programs, only with Excel. I have checked the printer and connection, but the problem continues.
short_description: Unable to print documents from Microsoft Excel application.
description: I am having a problem with printing from Excel. When I try to print, I get an error message saying my file could not be printed. This issue does not happen with other programs, only with Excel. I have checked the printer and connection, but the problem continues.
